name: Mint Coriander Dip (Dhania-podina Chutney)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all the ingredients to the container of a food processor or electric blender.
2. Blend until finely pureed and reduced to a creamy sauce.
3. Check for salt and adjust if necessary.
4. Pour into a small bowl.
5. Cover and chill thoroughly before serving.
